subject: gtc change for removal of hpl language

emails.subject: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.subject_base: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.body: GTC Change for removal of HPL language Hi Louise, I was wondering when you would be comfortable with us changing the GTC. Apparently AEP is threatning us with breach of contract if we don't remove the language right away. Thanks. Savita

emails.subject: Re: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.subject_base: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.body: Re: GTC Change for removal of HPL language Not in the near future Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: RE: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.subject_base: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.body: RE: GTC Change for removal of HPL language Hi Mark, Barbara, Can we work something out with AEP whereby we don't change the online GTC for sometime? We do have language in the Product Long Description that adresses the sale of HPL. Is there any other way we can allay AEP's concern that counterparties logging onto EnronOnline are confused about the actual ownership of HPL. Thanks. Savita To: Puthigai, Savita

emails.subject: RE: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.subject_base: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.body: RE: GTC Change for removal of HPL language Hi Mark, Barbara, Can we work something out with AEP whereby we don't change the online GTC for sometime? We do have language in the Product Long Description that adresses the sale of HPL. Is there any other way we can allay AEP's concern that counterparties logging onto EnronOnline are confused about the actual ownership of HPL. Thanks. Savita To: Puthigai, Savita

emails.subject: RE: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.subject_base: GTC Change for removal of HPL language
emails.body: Will do and will make sure that there are no GTC changes in the near future.
